documents.text: List of most-viewed YouTube videos - Wikipedia "Baby"* · Justin Bieber, 245,400,000 ; "Bad Romance" · Lady Gaga, 178,400,000 ; "Charlie Bit My Finger" · HDCYT, 128,900,000 ; "Evolution of Dance" (3rd time as most ... List of most-viewed YouTube videos YouTube is an American video-sharing website headquartered in San Bruno, California. The site indicates view counts of each uploaded video, making it possible to keep track of the most viewed, many of which continue to exist while others are no longer available on the site. Although the most-viewed were initially viral videos uploaded by amateur content creators, such as "Evolution of Dance" and "Charlie Bit My Finger", they have increasingly become music videos produced on behalf of professional recording artists. Since Lady Gaga's "Bad Romance" in 2009, every video that has reached the top of the "most-viewed YouTube videos" list has been a music video. In November 2005, a Nike advertisement featuring Brazilian football player Ronaldinho became the first video to reach 1,000,000 views.[1] The billion-view mark was first passed by Gangnam Style in December 2012. On January 13, 2022, Pinkfong's "Baby Shark" became the first video to hit 10,000,000,000 views.[2] Views represent how many times a video is watched. To ensure that traffic is coming from actual humans and not scripts or other deceptive methods, YouTube has a secret algorithm to separate legitimate views from illegitimate ones, and only legitimate views are included in the view count.[3] Specifically, to count as a legitimate view, a user must intentionally initiate the playback of the video and play at least 30 seconds of the video (or the entire video for shorter videos). Additionally, while replays count as views, there is a limit of 4 or 5 views per IP address during a 24-hour period, after which point, no further views from that IP are counted until the 24-hour period expires.[4][5] Contents Top videos The following table lists the top 30 most-viewed videos on YouTube, with each total rounded to the nearest 10 million views, uploader, and publication date.

YouTube continues to dominate as the most popular video service globally, ahead of Instagram, TikTok, or Netflix, according to New Omdia research. Having the largest collection of video content in the world, YouTube allows users to explore a vast array of channels, watch, like, and share their favourite videos, and subscribe to those they enjoy most. These are the 10 most-watched YouTube videos of all time Since 2005, YouTube has been entertaining us with clips and internet phenomena of all kinds. While viral videos were initially more in demand, music videos have been the most popular since 2010. The song “Hello” by Adele is currently at the top of the list of videos that have reached over a billion views the fastest – with an incredible 87 days. But it’s still not among the top 10 most clicked videos. In the following ranking of the ten most-clicked YouTube videos (as of February 2024), we reveal what they are: In tenth place is an educational video from the Russian channel Miroshka TV to teach children the different colors in Russian. The clip shows several animated eggs on a farm that are colored in stages. The video has been clicked on more than 5 billion times since 2018. 9th place: Mark Ronson ft. Bruno Mars – “Uptown Funk” Release date: 19 November 2014 Views: 5.18 billion In ninth place is the music video “Uptown Funk” by music producer Mark Ronson and Bruno Mars. Ronson won the 2015 Brit Awards in the British Single of the Year category with the song. Fun fact: Fleur East performed the song in the semi-final of the 11th season of The X Factor (at the end of 2014), even though it had not yet been released at the time. 8th place: ChuChu TV – “Phonics Song with TWO Words – A For Apple” Release date: 06 March 2014 Views: 5.74 billion This video is an English-language children’s song for learning the alphabet. Ten years after its release, the video has reached more than 5.7 billion views.

Exploring the Top 10 Most Viewed YouTube Videos of All Time Adelaide Film Works Audience is Everything YouTube has evolved into a global phenomenon, with billions of users around the world consuming content on a daily basis. As the platform’s popularity has skyrocketed, certain videos have risen to prominence, amassing an astonishing number of views. In this blog, we’ll look closer at the top 10 most viewed YouTube videos of all time, delving into why they’ve captured the world’s attention and providing the URLs for your viewing pleasure. 1. Baby Shark Dance Views: Over 11.1 billion views The crown jewel of YouTube’s most-viewed videos, “Baby Shark Dance” is a catchy children’s song that has taken the world by storm. Its colourful animation, simple lyrics, and repetitive melody make it a hit with young viewers. The “Baby Shark” phenomenon has also become a cultural touchstone, inspiring countless parodies and dance challenges. “Despacito” by Luis Fonsi featuring Daddy Yankee became a global sensation, breaking language barriers with its infectious reggaeton beat and sensual lyrics. The song’s music video showcases the vibrant culture of Puerto Rico, adding to its appeal. “Despacito” not only topped the charts but also became an internet sensation, earning its spot on this list. 3. Shape of You – Ed Sheeran Views: Over 7.5 billion views Ed Sheeran’s “Shape of You” is a testament to the power of a well-crafted pop song. Its relatable lyrics and upbeat melody struck a chord with listeners worldwide. The video features Sheeran as he navigates the dating scene, adding a relatable storyline to the catchy tune. See You Again” by Wiz Khalifa featuring Charlie Puth is an emotional tribute to the late actor Paul Walker, a key figure in the “Fast & Furious” film franchise.

The 20 Most Viewed YouTube Videos From humble beginnings, YouTube now boasts billions of users, videos on every topic imaginable, and can take credit for a slew of careers that took their first steps on the platform. It is now a media giant in its own right, and if a video goes viral, there’s a big chance you watched it on YouTube. In its 19 years of existence, many different videos have held the coveted “most viewed” title, but which ones currently hold the crown? Below we’ve listed the 20 most watched YouTube videos on the platform, so you can find out. 20. “Counting Stars” by OneRepublic (4.1bn views) To start things off, we have a 2013 video from American pop-rock band OneRepublic. 19. "Waka Waka (This Time for Africa)" by Shakira (4.1bn views) “Waka Waka” by Colombian singer Shakira, featuring the South African band Freshlyground, has moved up one place since last year. “Waka Waka” was released on May 7, 2010 as the official song of the 2010 FIFA World Cup, which was held in South Africa. 18. “Sugar” by Maroon 5 (4.15bn views) Next up, we have Maroon 5. 17. “Shree Hanuman Chalisa” by T-Series Bhakti Sagar (4.26bn views) The "Shree Hanuman Chalisa" is a devotional hymn dedicated to Lord Hanuman, a Hindu god who is half-monkey and half-human, celebrated for his strength, devotion, and courage. The version by T-Series Bhakti Sagar is widely popular in prayers and spiritual gatherings. 16. "Lakdi ki kathi" by JingleToons (4.3bn views) A popular Hindi children's song about the bliss of childhood. The publisher of this video has disabled playback on other sites.
